name: @vaagatech/reconcile-workspace
description: Declarative Snapshot and Reconciliation Testing — open-source monorepo by VaagaTech
author: VaagaTech (https://www.vaagatech.com)

scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace=@vaagatech/reconcile-engine && npm run build --workspace=@vaagatech/reconcile-auth-adapters && npm run build --workspace=@vaagatech/reconcile-api-adapters && npm run build --workspace=@vaagatech/reconcile-core
scripts.build:demos: npm run build --workspace=@vaagatech/reconcile-demo-shared && npm run build --workspace=@vaagatech/reconcile-demo-scenario-reconcile-ignore-fields && npm run build --workspace=@vaagatech/reconcile-demo-scenario-reconcile-transformations && npm run build --workspace=@vaagatech/reconcile-demo-scenario-db-vs-db-sqlite && npm run build --workspace=@vaagatech/reconcile-demo-scenario-reconcile-data-mapping-function && npm run build --workspace=@vaagatech/reconcile-demo-scenario-db-comparison-transformations && npm run build --workspace=@vaagatech/reconcile-demo-scenario-reconcile-combined-options && npm run build --workspace=@vaagatech/reconcile-demo-scenario-api-vs-file-rest && npm run build --workspace=@vaagatech/reconcile-demo-scenario-api-vs-file-graphql && npm run build --workspace=@vaagatech/reconcile-demo-scenario-api-vs-file-soap && npm run build --workspace=@vaagatech/reconcile-demo-scenario-api-vs-db-rest && npm run build --workspace=@vaagatech/reconcile-demo-scenario-api-vs-db-graphql && npm run build --workspace=@vaagatech/reconcile-demo-scenario-api-vs-db-soap && npm run build --workspace=@vaagatech/reconcile-demo-scenario-db-vs-api-rest && npm run build --workspace=@vaagatech/reconcile-demo-scenario-db-vs-api-graphql && npm run build --workspace=@vaagatech/reconcile-demo-scenario-db-vs-api-soap && npm run build --workspace=@vaagatech/reconcile-demo-run-all
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:demos
scripts.demo: npm run build && npm run start --workspace=@vaagatech/reconcile-demo-run-all
scripts.publish:packages: npm run build:packages && npm publish --workspace=@vaagatech/reconcile-engine --access public && npm publish --workspace=@vaagatech/reconcile-auth-adapters --access public && npm publish --workspace=@vaagatech/reconcile-api-adapters --access public && npm publish --workspace=@vaagatech/reconcile-core --access public
